programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los niños a menudo se encuentran a merced del mundo de los adultos y, algunas veces, se sienten incapaces de influir en el curso de sus propias existencias.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la inocencia de la infancia, el miedo es perfecto y no resulta influenciado por la racionalidad adulta, lo cual supone que se puede comprender a cabalidad el mundo que nos rodea.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Algunas personas creen que todo nuestro conocimiento del mundo nos llega a través de la percepción sensorial y de los poderes del razonamiento. Otras, en cambio, piensan que podemos obtener conocimiento por medio de la intuición.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La dinámica de las personas que viven bajo un mismo techo debe tener un equilibrio delicado. Mike y su novia, Lisa, mantienen una relación sana y, sin nada que les preocupe, se mudan juntos, pero no están solos en su nueva casa.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ciertos mitos nativos norteamericanos hablan de criaturas sobrenaturales que protegen a los muertos. Los primeros exploradores de algunas tribus algonquinas del noreste de los Estados Unidos contaban historias sobre hombres lobo.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La familia Fahey ha vivido en la misma casa en la ciudad de Galway, Irlanda, durante más de treinta años. Martha Fahey creció allí y ahora se prepara para criar a su hija en el mismo ambiente, con la ayuda de sus padres.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Abril James siempre había soñado con renovar una casa victoriana. Cuando ella y su prometido Matt compran una casa histórica en Salt Lake City, estado de Utah.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Entre los psíquicos del mundo que afirman poseer habilidades extrasensoriales, los hay quienes dicen que pueden retroceder en el tiempo y ser testigos de acontecimientos del pasado que se desarrollan ante ellos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuando las personas inocentes se ven atacadas por entidades provenientes del reino sobrenatural, ponen su confianza en manos de investigadores paranormales para que estos los protejan de lo desconocido.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La fuerza de lo diabólico radica en el poder del engaño. De formas muy sutiles, destruye los lazos familiares y los de la amistad, desvirtúa las creencias de los creyentes y toma posesión de los vivos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: A lo largo de todo Estados Unidos existen millones de cementerios rurales. Algunos están muy mal identificados y, con el paso del tiempo, pueden ser olvidados con facilidad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los sueños recurrentes constituyen la manera en la que nuestra mente lidia con los problemas que debemos resolver. Pero ¿qué ocurre cuando la vida comienza a imitar los miedos más temibles del subconsciente?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El estrés puede tener efectos poderosos y destructivos. Puede debilitar tanto el cuerpo como la mente, puede deteriorar las relaciones e incluso puede hacer que un alma se vuelva vulnerable a lo sobrenatural.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Todos tenemos secretos. Algunos de nosotros les ocultamos cosas a nuestros amigos para evitar la vergüenza. Otros, se las ocultamos a nuestros seres queridos porque tenemos el temor de que estropeen la imagen que tienen de nosotros.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Históricamente, Mallorca ha capturado la fantasía de los artistas de todo el mundo a lo largo de los años, ya que Miró, Picasso, Dalí, Chopin y Sand cayeron bajo el hechizo de la irresistible Mallorca.

programme.title: Sobrevivir en la naturaleza
programme.desc: La buena comunicación es una de las estrategias más versátiles e importantes para la supervivencia tanto en animales solitarios como en animales sociales.

programme.title: Africa, la más salvaje.
programme.desc: Namibia es un territorio árido y agreste. Ha sido habitada desde hace miles de años por personas y animales, pero no muestra señales de pérdida de popularidad entre ninguno de ellos.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Mientras la mayoría considera a los grandes gatos o los grandes colmillos como los verdaderos íconos salvajes de África, pocos aprecian a las criaturas más pequeñas que dominan la pradera - los antílopes.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Este es un retrato real de Mayotte, una isla donde los pequeños pueblos viven en paz con costumbres ancestrales y donde abunda la creatividad de la naturaleza.

programme.desc: This high-flyer is sure he will soar his way through elementary school. But when he runs out of a gas, he might consider cheating sooner rather than later!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: After receiving a heartfelt plea from a daughter begging to get her mom off drugs, Steve travels to a small town in Ohio! Rachelle will fight her way through rehab and embrace a chance to change her life forever!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Tacarra has been with Jaray for 5 years and raising two children together. But now she feels the passion has died and his coldness towards her has driven her crazy, and now she questions her marriage, and Jaray's honesty.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Heaven and her two daughters have been prostitutes for April's boyfriend, Dino. Today, angry family members and even Dino's ex try to talk these women away from him!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Today Mark will be forced to choose between his lover, Amy, and his wife. Next Michelle is here to dump her lover for her ex-boyfriend, Frankie. Later, Erikka lives with her boyfriend but her heart belongs to her friend, Larry.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Deuce is here to finally come clean to his wife and tell her that he's been sleeping with their friend. Next Debbie is about to find out that her boyfriend, Chris, is more than just friends with his friend Cory!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Preston is ready to ditch Jessica for cheating, but he’s the actual cheater! Then, can KB justify falling for Krystal’s god-sister even with a very open relationship?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Daphne is sleeping with her daughter's boyfriend, G-Quan! He vows that he loves Wendy. But G-Quan has one final confession. Next Jenna says her husband's constant nagging drove her into the arms of her best friend.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Michael is here to reveal to his girl Tiffany that he may have gone a little too far with her sister when he let her practice her stripper moves on him. Now he's worried sick that Tiffany will never forgive him.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Solo has a few things he needs to tell his best friend and girlfriend, Vixen. Next Cheryl caught her boyfriend, Nick, in bed with another woman. Later Lonnie's wife, Kim, is having an affair with their 18-year-old friend.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jerry is 58 years old and has had three big changes. He is currently happily engaged to a woman named Joy and speaks about his past gender confusion.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Felicia is here to confront her boyfriend and her mother who have been sleeping together for months! Next Susan must come clean to her boyfriend and tell him she's working the corner again!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Wayne doesn't know his fiancee, Kristin, is sleeping with her cousin! Next Springer Cam is there when JB drops the bomb on both of his girlfriends and tells them he's been cheating. Later Vinnie is sleeping with his best friend's fiancee, Shannon.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Mistie is married to Matt, but left him and is now living with his brother, Josh! Next Erika's boyfriend knows she's a man, but what he doesn't know is that she's a prostitute! Then Tommy is here to get his girlfriend, Tammy, back from her ex!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Toby says his lover has left him for a jailbird and he needs Jerry's help to get her back.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Calvin's mother Sheila says that Calvin and Sylvia's baby isn't his! Sylvia wants to prove her wrong! Plus, Amber had a miscarriage and is pregnant again, but suspect he's still cheating! Is he also hurting their daughter?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Naomi, de 17 años, ha cambiado repentinamente de actitud y tiene la misión de ser madre. Sus padres, Leeanders y April, necesitan que Steve intervenga.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Jennifer se fue de casa para protegerse de su padrastro Allen. 15 años después, su madre quiere una segunda oportunidad, pero Jennifer tiene dudas. ¿Puede Steve ayudar a componer esta familia destruida?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Lanikka está harta de los abusos de su novio Malcom. Después, los celos de Tim han destrozado su familia, pero ahora está desesperado por recuperarlos, ¿Tiffany lo dejará definitivamente?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desde que Chris tenía 3 meses, su abuela Anne lo crió y le dijo que su madre Hollie era abusiva y que trató de lastimarlo. Ahora Chris y Hollie se van a conocer por primera vez en nuestro escenario.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: LaShawna y su novio James sabrán si su amiga Coral lastimó a su hijo hace años. También admitirá que ella le fue infiel con Coral. ¿Cómo reaccionará él cuando descubra otro bombazo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Buddy pasa sus días fumando y jugando a los videojuegos, en lugar de mantener a su familia. Su novia Holly trabaja para mantenerlos a todos, incluyendo a su hijo que tiene necesidades especiales, ¡pero está harta!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Lainie y Justin tienen un bebé de 9 meses juntos. Justin lastima a Lainie porque cree que ella es infiel. ¿Pero cómo reaccionará Steve cuando se enfrente a Justin?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Quién es responsable del bienestar del pequeño Noel? Todo el mundo puede negar las acusaciones, pero alguien sabe qué pasó, y Steve va a obtener explicaciones.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kendra tiene la misión de salvarla de su novio tóxico Chris. A los 17 años, Kendra está embarazada de su sexto hijo. Kendra lo ha intentado casi todo, incluso echarlo de su casa, pero no solamente se defendió, sino que también golpeó a Kendra.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sheroya tiene 17 años y se esfuerza por criar a 2 niños mientras sale de fiesta sin parar. Su novio Malcolm suele ser infiel y la maltrata verbalmente. Steve tiene mucho trabajo por delante con esta pareja, pero ¿alguno de ellos despertará?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Everett tocó a la hija de su novia Michelle? Su ex Robert dice que su hija de 7 años lo contó. ¡Everett se someterá a una prueba con el detector de mentiras para desmentirlo! ¡No te pierdas estos resultados impactantes!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Marlo tocó a su hija con Sandra cuando ella tenía 7 años? Ha evitado confrontarla durante casi 10 años, pero hoy, Sandra no se irá hasta que no se sepa la verdad y se haga justicia por su hija.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Steve está celebrando otra reunión de chicas adolescentes para tratar los problemas más importantes a los que se pueden enfrentar todas las adolescentes, incluyendo el uso de drogas, el abuso físico y los agresores en Internet.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sherry fue atacada a los 15 años y se escapó de su casa. Quiere que Steve la ayude a reunirse con su madre. Después, la hija adolescente de Dawn, Cathy, dio a luz recientemente, pero vive asustada por el desempleado e inestable padre del bebé, Nick.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario se declara abiertamente ante Rosaura como su enemigo, al culparla de ser la responsable de su atentado. Rosaura acepta el desafío de Luis Mario y le proclama todo su odio.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura, en compañía de Doña Cruz, visita la casa de Rafael para informarlo sobre la situación que ella vivió en el Spa, en cual Eva amenazo Rosaura con muerte.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diana le reclama a Gaby por contarle a Diego sobre su embarazo, aun cuando ella solo lo hace por ayudarla para que su hijo tenga un padre y un apellido.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Maximiliano casi descubre a Debora, pero ella rápidamente culpa a Bruna.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Al salir de la sala, Ignacio le dice a Diana que será declarada culpable. Gaviota interviene en defensa de su hija.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diego está muy triste por la actitud que tomó Diana al darse cuenta que Maximiliano entró a la sala a presenciar su juicio.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Gertrudis llega furiosa a ver a Mariana porque ella desobedeció y se fue del convento. Mariana le dice que si no la ayuda a sacar a su padre de la cárcel, va a reconquistar a Willy.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Luciano relata que Mariana fue la mujer que se casó con Willy por dinero y le fue infiel, concluye que Ricardo también está detrás del dinero de su nieta y los echa a los dos del rancho.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana le cuenta a Ricardo que no puede hacer nada más, ya que sacrificó todo por su padre. Juliana está muy triste que su abuelo piense que Ricardo es un interesado y le cuenta a Lissette.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Gertrudis le propone a Willy divorciarse de Mariana de inmediato y que no le quitará su herencia. Elena le insinúa a Mariana que va a quedarse porque no quiere alejarse de Willy.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En el Spa, tras dejarse llevar por la provocación de Luis Mario, Rosaura invita a Rafael a ser parte de sus planes de revancha en contra de Eva y Luis Mario, al hacerlos testigos de su noviazgo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: A su llegada a la desierta isla, Luis Mario recuerda su lucha por sobrevivir al encontrarse abandonado en las profundidades del mar, tras ser víctima de un misterioso secuestro.

programme.title: ONE Vault

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Finally reunited and returned to their proper bodies, the Straw Hats fall in line as Luffy and Law lead the charge to settle the score with Caesar – and save the children!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Caesar hatches a plan to forever silence his enemies, Chopper races through the compound in search of the drugged children, and Tashigi's men make the ultimate sacrifice!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy races toward Caesar in the hopes of delivering a beating, Sanji saves a damsel in distress, and Chopper tries to prevent the children from eating the drugged candy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Vergo slug it out in a cloud of toxic gas, Law finds the room that could ruin the New World, and Luffy hopes to bring Caesar's reign of terror to a brutal end!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Law's true ambitions revealed, Doflamingo goes into action in order to protect his criminal operation! Caesar slips away from Luffy leaving him to face off with the frigid Monet, and the rest of the crew face down a menacing dragon!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy goes down fast after Monet puts a chill into him, and Trafalgar Law makes a desperate attempt to reclaim his heart during an electric battle with Vergo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Smoker attacks Vergo for assaulting his men, Luffy meets something strange in the trash heap, and a flashback reveals the true depths of Caesar's madness!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy befriends a dragon that used to be a human boy, and Captain Smoker continues his brutal battle with the villainous Vergo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy hitches a ride on a dragon, Mocha tries to keep the Master's candy away from her friends, and Zoro pits his steel against snow in a battle with Monet!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: It's Zoro vs. Monet in a duel to the death - or is it? Tashigi comes to lend a hand, and she'll need to bring her full might to compensate for Zoro's weakness! Meanwhile, Mocha is running out of options for keeping the candy away from the children.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper, Nami, and Robin watch in horror as Mocha makes a heartbreaking sacrifice in a courageous attempt to save the lives of her friends!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brownbeard heroically attempts to expose Caesar as a villain, the horrific truth about Punk Hazard is finally revealed, and Luffy puts the hurt on his gaseous enemy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes Caesar pay for his crimes against the children, and Smoker risks his life for a chance to see Vergo fall in battle!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law reaches the end of his epic battle with Vergo, and Luffy looks to land a devastating final blow on the murderous gasbag Caesar!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Word of Luffy and Law's alliance spreads throughout the world, Chopper and Brook race to stay ahead of the deadly gas, and Joker sends a team to rescue Caesar!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The laboratory crumbling around them, and time running out, Luffy, the Straw Hats, the G-5, the children and all the others make a final desperate sprint towards the one exit left off the island - but Joker has one more trick up his sleeve.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Straw Hats and company flee the crumbling laboratory, Caesar's desperate act of vengeance thwarts Joker's plan to forever silence his enemies!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky continues his battle with Buffalo and Baby 5, Nami uses a mighty gust of wind to save the children from a deadly cloud of gas, and Usopp takes a shot at capturing Caesar!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A dragon regains his boyish form, a noble warrior once feared dead makes a shocking resurrection, and bitter enemies set aside their differences to enjoy a well-deserved feast!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The weary marines and the rescued children get teary-eyed as they say goodbye to the Straw Hats. Meanwhile, Law enters into treacherous negotiations with Joker!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: On their way after having set out from Punk Hazard, the Straw Hats find out their next destination - just as a huge wave comes crashing down on the Sunny! But it's rough sailing for the G-5 as well, as Donflamingo arrives on the scene and wreaks havoc!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Aokiji's intercession saves Smoker and sends Joker off to rethink his strategy, leaving unanswered questions about Aokiji's current status. Meanwhile, the Straw Hats catch their breath as the Sunny makes its way through the rough seas of the New World.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Smooth seas stretch out before the Straw Hats as they leave Punk Hazard far behind -- but while they fear Donflamingo's return and prepare to face him, another foe lies in wait, whose powers could be their downfall!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Breed has Luffy, Trafalgar, and Chopper firmly in his grasp with his Peto-Peto power! Breed dreams of a world in which he has enslaved all the humans, but Luffy's stubborn persistence and unwillingness to cooperate may have landed him in hot water.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Dressrosa! Luffy and the Straw Hats divide into teams and set about their business on this passionate, enchanting island! But here, in the heart of enemy territory, danger lurks around every corner. Luffy and the others encounter a mysterious blind man.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Out and about in Dressrosa, Luffy and his team encounter a mysterious and powerful blind gambler - and run into trouble while his shocking powers distract everyone! Meanwhile, a major event in the Colosseum draws huge crowds.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Sanji, and Kin'emon strike off in search of the thieving fairy who has taken Zoro's sword, but Sanji finds himself mesmerized by the beautiful dancing of a gorgeous Dressrosa woman - with a deadly secret!

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A young woman disappears, leaving the community hoping for her safe return; when she is found murdered, a string of mysterious anonymous tips takes detectives into a toxic world of jealousy and obsession.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A missing persons case becomes something much darker when a sick, sinister affair is uncovered, leading investigators to believe foul play is involved.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The mysterious shooting of a restaurateur with no solid suspects and no murder weapon leaves detectives in a lurch, but when financial motives come to light, an undercover operation and clever forensic investigation turn the case upside-down.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood

programme.title: Project Almanac

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: Chris and Joe battle an 80-foot spruce, then a helicopter delivery almost goes wrong; John and Heather fall behind; Josh and his team must forklift their materials up the driveway to the build site after the semi gets stuck at the bottom.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: Josh and his team install the second-story floor joists in their cabin; Chris runs out of lumber to build a dock, and the framers he hired don't show up; wrong cuts and measurements threaten to put John and Heather further behind than ever.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: Chris and team prepare for two intense helicopter deliveries; Greg scales a raised rake wall to nail it into place; John and Heather's forklift threatens to knock over their frame; Josh and his team work from rickety ladders late into the night.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: All three builds are running behind schedule; John and Heather build a water catchment system; Chris' windows are delivered by helicopter in a dilapidated crate that swings violently in the wind; Josh comes close to tipping over his forklift.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: John and Heather try to figure out how to install drywall without covering their timber frame; Chris' windows spin violently during delivery; Joe and Duane install the metal roofing tin on a steep slope; bears eat Josh's onsite supplies.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: Time is running out for the builders; Chris gets help installing solar panels; Greg and Ivan work to finish the interior tongue and groove paneling for the cabin's roof; Josh works on log stairs; John and Heather's build site is flooded.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: The builders push to finish their cabins before winter strikes; Josh and his team fight the rain and wind; Chris and his wife rush to install the kitchen counters and furniture; John and Heather struggle to finish their cabin before the snow falls.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: Three new teams begin their projects; Matt and Amy Hill realize building in snow is complicated; Mike and Dan Owens mill the lumber needed for their build; Jackie Keizer hires a team that struggles to bring out an excavator to dig her foundation.

programme.title: Building Alaska

programme.title: Building Alaska

programme.title: 1000 maneras de morir
programme.desc: Un estafador de correo electrónico es borrado; una alumna sexy es suspendida; un ladrón de tumbas cava la suya; caudillo inhala muerte cristalina; una pareja se mata en el aire; dos perdedores vuelan por el aire; un viejo nazi encuentra una vieja bala.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Intensifica una pelea incluyendo alcohol y un querido mascota. Un conductor sigue cambiando su relato. Los oficiales llegan a un incidente doméstico y encuentran al sospecho en un lugar raro.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un delincuente culpa a la responsabilidad que tiene a su familia. Un papá no tiene más opción que reportar a su hijo. Los oficiales descubren artículos interesantes en el auto de un hombre de familia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un oficial pide refuerzos por tener desventaja. Un hombre vive más de lo esperado por ayudar al vecino. La policía separa a una pareja casada después de revisar su vehículo.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una persecución a alta velocidad cambia cuando el conductor huye a pie. Los vecinos se enojan cuando los niños hacen ejercicio. Un conductor nervioso se enoja cuando la policía registra al pasajero.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un delincuente se escapa y busca refugio con su abuela. Una explosión permite que los oficiales saquen un dispositivo. Unos vecinos preocupados rehúsan devolver un perro a sus dueños.

programme.title: Emergencias bizarras

programme.title: Emergencias bizarras
programme.desc: En este episodio, una derrota del rugby femenino lleva a todas las jugadoras a la enfermería; un instructor de salud termina con un hoyo en la cabeza tras chocar con la puerta de un coche.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía responde a un fatal accidente automovilístico. La policía interroga a un sospechoso de robo, pero el asegura ser la verdadera víctima. Un hombre dice que un trastorno lo hace huir.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un preso en libertad condicional lleva a los oficiales a una calle sin salida. Un novio celoso cuenta su versión que sigue cambiando. Un oficial ayuda a unas personas disgustadas a hacer las paces.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre tiene un episodio de taquicardia y requiere asistencia médica. Una infractora parece no captar la gravedad de su situación. Son 2 contra uno cuando la policía cuestiona a un trío interesante.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Metrópoli CDMX

programme.desc: When O'Neill and Teal'c take an SGC-modified Goa'uld glider out for a test flight, they lose control and are sucked into outer space by a Goa'uld tracking device. It's up to the team to rescue them, before they run out oxygen and life support.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When SGC commander Gen. Hammond steps down saying he's too old for the job, SG-1 suspects foul play. When a hard-nosed new general steps in to replace him and splits up SG-1, they vow to solve the mystery and get their beloved General back.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams travel to Peru, where the Race gets physical and teams use their fitness trackers to help find their next clue. Also, Blair and Hayley's communication issues reach a boiling point.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the penultimate leg, the final four teams race through Peru for a spot in the finale and a chance at the $1 million prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Everything is bigger in Texas, including THE AMAZING RACE season finale! With the $1 million dollar prize on the line, the final four teams race from Peru to Dallas, where they go to great heights at the top of AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven new teams take off on the journey of a lifetime from Venice Beach, Calif. and head for Rio de Janeiro, where teams take a thrilling helicopter ride and face a huge decision at the Fast Forward.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the birthplace of Pope Francis, where they visit the church where he was baptized. Also, Racers are driven up a wall when they learn a tango with a twist.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Attention to detail is paramount during a meaty challenge and one team faces a penalty after a costly mistake.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As Racers soar high above the breathtaking Victoria Falls toward a double U-turn, Team Texas uses their express pass in the hopes of eliminating The Green Team.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams conquer their fears in Zambia, Africa when they plunge more than 250 feet over the Zambezi River, feed a trio of crocodiles and walk with lions through the jungle.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Paris where Racers soar high above the French countryside and "drop mics" with a popular French rapper.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team risks falling to the back of the pack after taking a break to sight-see, and Racers take a big jump when faced with a Double Dutch Detour.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams hit the town in Krakow, Poland with local street musicians to earn a hard day's pay.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With only six teams remaining, the competition heats up when Racers face a U-Turn, and some teams enjoy the sweet taste of victory after a candy making challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers face a third U-turn for the first time in the show's history, and teams try to power through an exhausting, late night detour on their way to an Indian wedding.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race through Hong Kong and Macau, China where they take part in a spectacular water show at The House of Dancing Water and compete for a chance to race in the final leg.

programme.desc: Andy opens a coin laundry to save money for Opie's college education.

programme.desc: Andy learns his cousin Bradford is a broke phony, but keeps quiet because Aunt Bee thinks he's a wealthy relative.

programme.desc: Howard quits his boring job as county clerk and becomes a Caribbean island beachcomber.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi trek into Rwanda's forest to see Colobus monkeys with their famous black-and-white markings, and hike a volcanic island filled with fruit bats.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack for all-canine countdown. Meet working dogs on patrol to save rhinos and find lost hikers, get a look at rare populations of African wild dogs, and meet some amazing dogs that provide love and companionship.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he joins some very fortunate creatures on their journeys back to the wild, like Koalas, Big Horn Sheep, Alligators, Grizzly Bears, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: On the Caribbean Island of Dominica, Jack climbs up Morne Diablotin in search of the Sisserou, the world's most endangered parrot. Jack also encounters a large Boa Constrictor, then tries to keep pace with a “mountain” chicken.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack goes behind the scenes at the Columbus Zoo, visiting its oldest and newest residents. Then Jack heads to the OSU equine center and goes on rounds with the vet staff before heading to a metro park that is re-introducing a herd of American bison.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's in the Fiji Islands where he prepares for the most hands-on fishing trip of his life. Find out how the local people catch dinner using vines.Then they get a look at the top-secret methods used to create the most colorful pearls in the world.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack visits the world's largest crocodile farm and assists in the capture of a 14-foot reptilian destined for a Thailand education center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets some animals that stockpile food and supplies. Check out the fascinating behaviors of Leaf-cutter Ants, Bears, Leopards, Honey Bees, Camels and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: What does it take to rescue some of the world’s biggest, fastest and strongest animals? Find out as Jack counts down the amazing rescue stories of six special creatures. Chimps, dolphins, cheetahs, Asian elephants, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family as they explore Rwanda's Nyungwe Forest encountering wild Chimpanzees, and Colobus Monkeys. They also get lessons from the locals on traditional tea picking and modern beekeeping.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack on an amazing safari through Kenya's Masai Mara as he braves the rushing Mara River filled with Hippos and Nile Crocs. Then Jack explores wildlife after dark.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as meets creatures battling back and returning to the wild. Manatees, Bald Eagles, Sea Turtles, Crowned Cranes and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Adaptations
programme.desc: From the Arctic to the desert, animals have found a way to survive and thrive in every eco-system on the planet. Join Jack as he’s counting down ten amazing animal adaptations.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack on an adventure to bear country in Montana! Jack and some local bear experts come face-to-face with a grizzly that raided a family's farmhouse. Then Jack discovers amazing animal behaviors caught on tape.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Stinkiest Stinkers
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he sniffs out the smelliest animals on the planet! Sloths, Tasmanian devils, sperm whales, binturongs, hyenas, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he heads to South Africa to meet a very special, and critically endangered, Southern black Rhino named Munu, who's lost his vision, but found his forever home at Founder's Lodge.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he reveals how to tell the difference between some commonly confused creatures, like Cheetahs and Leopards, Crocs and Gators, Penguins and Puffins, Turtles and Tortoises and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jack of All Trades
programme.desc: Caring for animals can be a big job! Join Jack for some on-the-job-training as he explores six incredible, dangerous and dirty animal jobs, like wrangling crocodiles, caring for elephants, herding cattle and a whole lot more!

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: After preparing breakfast cosisting of yogurt, chilli scrambled egg wrap, and bloody mary, Jamie and his mates gather around the TV to watch England play in World Cup 2002.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: Pukka Tukka party food.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: Jamie shows London police how to prepare spicy foods; cellophane noodle salad; monkfish; mango lassi.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: Jamie shows pushbike couriers how to make great lunches; squashed cherry tomato salad; meatballs; calzones.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: Vegetarian meal; mushroom sarnie; tagliatelle; pecan and vanilla ice cream.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: A post-match meal for rugby players; chicken in milk; proper polenta; panettone bread-and-butter pudding.

programme.title: Save With Jamie
programme.desc: Chef Jamie Oliver prepares pot-roasted ham hocks with parsley sauce, while roasting butternut squash to add to spinach rotolo.

programme.title: Save With Jamie
programme.desc: Jamie rustles up a frugal, but amazing paella with succulent chicken thighs, spicy chorizo and prawns from the freezer; turning pork leftovers into crispy Mexican tacos and French Vietnamese banh mi.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver shows how to cook oozy mushroom risotto, with spinach salad and quick lemon and raspberry cheesecake, all in just 30 minutes.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie makes duck salad with giant croutons and cheat's rice pudding with stewed fruit.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: On the menu is rogan josh curry with fluffy rice, carrot salad, poppadoms, and flatbread.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver prepares `Pregnant Jools's Pasta' with crunchy chicory and watercress salad and little frangipane tarts.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver shows how to make spinach and feta filo pie, cucumber salad, tomato salad and coated ice cream in just thirty minutes.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver shows how to make roast beef with baby Yorkshires, little carrots, crispy potatoes and super-quick gravy, all, amazingly, in half an hour.

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club
programme.desc: Hugh Bonneville treats diners to an authentic pad thai; Jamie goes for the ultimate roast with his overnight shoulder of pork; Jimmy builds a smoker to create a barbecue brisket.

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club
programme.desc: Ellie Goulding relives the junk food of her past as she gives a dirty burger a vegan twist; Jamie cooks an indulgent Japanese pork belly ramen; Jimmy reinvents the humble roast chicken with his DIY rotisserie.

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club
programme.desc: Michael Sheen returns to his Welsh roots when he cooks a delicious lamb cawl; Jamie wows the diners with his pork belly and beef brisket chilli; Jimmy builds a DIY Peking duck oven to produce crispy duck.

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club
programme.desc: Paloma Faith relives childhood memories with a delicious Portuguese salt cod dish; Jamie serves sticky Chinese ribs; Jimmy brews his very own DIY craft beer; the boys take up the case of the meats that have fallen out of favor.

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club
programme.desc: Orlando Bloom cooks up a tagine; Jamie makes Asian seafood parcels and Jimmy takes on the sausage; they also find some wasted goat meat that's great to eat.

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club
programme.desc: Actress Goldie Hawn joins the boys to cook her favourite Italian comfort food dish; Jamie makes a slow-cooked shoulder of lamb.

programme.title: Jamie's Quick & Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver presents the ultimate set of go-to recipes for quick and easy-to-remember cooking. If you think you haven't got time to cook - think again.(30min)

programme.title: Jamie's Quick & Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie creates chickpea and chard pork, egg fried rice, beef carpaccio with Egyptian spice, and a simple fish pie.

programme.desc: The son of a prominent rancher is shot in the back while tracking poachers.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: A notorious killer escapes from jail hoping to recover his treasure and kill the Lone Ranger and Tonto.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Julie catches love fever on the high seas and is thinking of marriage when the Pacific Princess is chartered for a dazzling star-studded wedding cruise that takes Capt. Stubing, his crew, and their guests on a beautiful scenic journey to Alaska.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Wealthy Alaskan Buddy Bowers (Lorne Greene) recruits the services of the ship to take the wedding party from Vancouver, B.C., to Skagway, Alaska, for the nuptial ceremonies for his orphaned granddaughter, Carol (Lisa Hartman).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When Doc (Bernie Kopell) gets the flu, he receives private treatment from a gorgeous doctor (Susan Sullivan) who keeps his fever up even when his temperature drops.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A strict IRS auditor (Phyllis Diller) falls for Capt. Stubing (Gavin MacLeod) until she finds something in his file.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac (Ted Lange) has trouble on the high seas when the Love Boat crew discovers he has included some racy tales about them in his new novel.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In a poignant episode, Capt. Stubling (Gavin McLeod) is reunited with his love child, Vicki (Jill Whelan).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When Julie (Lauren Tewes) joins the ship's secret all-male club, she is shocked by the initiation rites.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A swinging bachelor (Dack Rambo) gets the shock of his life when the phony story he tells his gorgeous girlfriend (Barbi Benton) turns out to be true.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A college professor (Dick Martin) turns the Love Boat into a laboratory to test the romantic responses of his lovely female student (Char Fontane).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A tantalizing entertainer (Charo) receives some unwanted advice on love from members of the crew, who don't approve of her marriage plans.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In a special two-hour presentation, a singer (Donny Osmond) trying to break into show business finds out unexpectedly that his hillbilly family has decided to take the cruise.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Doc (Bernie Kopell) comes down with a bad case of heartache when the beautiful girl (Misty Rowe) he wants to be alone with boards ship with her ever-present sister (Vicki Lawrence).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A brilliant plain-Jane (Shelley Hack) becomes a fetching glamour gal with the help of Julie (Lauren Tewes), and falls in love with a man (Kevin Tighe) who has some mistaken ideas about her.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac (Ted Lange) finds himself in a precarious position when he meets a beautiful former school chum (Bernadette Stanis) and her macho husband (Clifton Davis).

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people will let nothing stand between them and their goals. In their tortured minds, raw desire replaces all reason, and homicide becomes a convenient means to an end.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark goes to work for Will Temple, a badly scarred, very mysterious rancher.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Corey Hazlett insists he's innocent of murder, despite Lucas's eyewitness testimony.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to dissuade a latter-day knight from rushing into battle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Abe Lincoln's claim that he's the Great Emancipator amuses everyone except Matt Yordy.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Stubborn Grandpa Fogarty is Lucas's main roadblock as he tries to get young Woody Fogarty to attend school.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to stop embittered John Holliver from venting his wrath on the people who expelled him from town years before.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark is kidnapped and held for ransom, he finds himself an unwilling companion of gunman Carl Avery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas seeks an escape when he's captured by outlaws while seeking help for an injured Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The young Queen-to-be of France hides out in North Fork with her sick brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A notorious killer is being held in the North Fork jail. When word gets around that Gordo's gang is on its way to free him, the whole town becomes frightened.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Englishman arrives with a custom-made rifle and a plan to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Len Richards and his brother, Ab, confront a Lucas McCain look-alike, Earl Bantry and his sidekick K.C. Peters, for slaughtering one of Richards' steers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark stop on the way to the county fair to deliver a message to Micah, who is escorting a prisoner to be hanged. Mark and Lucas recognize the prisoner.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Milly are shocked when Lucas begins gambling. They don't know that Lucas is "undercover" trying to catch a man cheating.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Genet solidifies her base of power; Daryl has a job to do before he can return to America.

programme.desc: Daryl, Maggie, Gabriel, Negan and Elijah battle the Reapers for food; Aaron and the Alexandrians must survive a storm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene looks for Stephanie after she mysteriously goes missing; Connie investigates a story on Trooper Davis; Carol helps Hornsby with a labor dispute at a drug farm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Con pocas provisiones, y sin poder confiar en la gente a su alrededor, Rick lidera una misión donde el riesgo podría ser mucho mayor que la recompensa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Enfrentados a un grupo de personas despreciables, Rick y sus compañeros deberán idear un plan para obtener una ventaja decisiva.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En este episodio conoceremos a otro grupo de sobrevivientes. Pero lo que parece seguro y agradable por fuera tiene también un lado oscuro.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Nuevos problemas generan nuevas disputas en el grupo durante una misión. ¿Conseguirán superar las diferencias y sobrevivir a este desafío?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En una heroica misión de rescate, algunos miembros del grupo deben volver a un lugar familiar. El escenario será tan grande como el riesgo de la misión.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Atareado con la resistencia en la iglesia y con una misión de rescate, el grupo podría colapsar. ¿Será este un punto de ruptura para los sobrevivientes?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las reglas y la moral son dejadas de lado a causa de nuevos enemigos. Rick intentará conseguir un acuerdo pacífico, pero ellos podrían preferir la violencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de todas las dificultades que el grupo enfrentó, un pequeño desvío podría ser la solución que buscaban.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La vida a la intemperie dejó al grupo golpeado y atormentado. ¿Serán capaces de continuar esa marcha penosa? ¿Son siquiera las mismas personas que alguna vez fueron?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Durante una tormenta espectacular, Rick y el grupo conocen a unas personas aparentemente amistosas. ¿Serán dignas de confianza, o solo intentan manipular a Rick?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Adaptarse a un nuevo estilo de vida resulta difícil para el grupo. Quizás la vida en la carretera haya sido demasiado traicionera para que vuelvan a ser lo que alguna vez fueron.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y el grupo continúan la adaptación a su nuevo entorno. ¿Serán capaces de volver a la normalidad? O mejor aún, ¿qué es lo normal ahora?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y el grupo enfrentan desafíos que ponen en riesgo su vida mientras intentan que su nuevo hogar sea un lugar seguro. ¿Valdrá realmente la pena esa nueva utopía?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo descubre, poco a poco, que la vida en su refugio empieza a replicar las adversidades que enfrentaron afuera. ¿Podrá Rick soportarlo?

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom replaces a rotted post. Restored historic window sashes are installed. The garage's electrical service is upgraded. Kevin shows the kitchen's inspiration. Tom removes reveals historic boards.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom installs new red cedar clapboards. Richard helps remove some old kitchen plumbing. Roger installs a new asphalt driveway. Richard shows how he's solving a rough plumbing problem.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm and Tom create a historically accurate front door. The ailing American Beech tree gets saved. Kevin shows an antique home. Interior designers share the direction for the new space.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger installs a granite front step and spreads ryegrass on the lawn. Tom installs new wood windows. Norm visits the Colonel James Barrett house. Richard seals and insulates the old ductwork.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Norm install decorative timbers. Richard shows A/C condensers' concrete mounting pad. Norm visits the Parson Capen House in MA. Tom uses a new hidden deck fastening system.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger creates a winding brick path. Fitting a modern kitchen into an old house. Richard shows a zero-clearance gas fireplace. Norm makes wainscoting out of old boards. White oak floorboards go down.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom restores the c. 1720 front door and makes "barn" doors for the pantry. Richard shows a new zone damper system. Mark installs a hearth using reclaimed bricks.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger lays the driveway finish. Custom wall coverings and ironwork are installed. Tom shows the new garage door. Richard shows the latest water heaters. We see family room and kitchen lighting plans.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger and Jenn install plant material. Backsplash tile, wallpaper, and metalwork are installed. We see the finished kitchen and design choices. The wrap party begins.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The crew opens the Barrington, RI, project. The challenge will be building to withstand the marine environment. Norm sees a classic home recently built. Andy's crew starts gutting the first floor.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin finds the new foundation in place and framing underway. Kevin meets the Exec. Director of the Coastal Resources Management Council to see the lengths people will go to live by the water in RI.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm shows installing windows with a custom copper pan for flashing. Kevin visits the Hurricane Research Lab at the U of Florida. At the end of the day, it is time for the clambake down on the beach.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Andy uses red cedar shingles between the first and second floors. Richard shows a hydronic HVAC system integrated with solar hot water and electricity. Norm shows Newport's famous mansions.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A sustainable landscape is created with native plants. Metalsmiths install a custom copper gutter. Ross shows an off-the-grid bed and breakfast lighthouse. Richard sees our solar hot water system.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The new deck goes in. Red cedar shingles are cut into a wave pattern. Kevin shows designs. Norm learns why polyurethane is a better choice than PVC stock for decorative brackets.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The driveway is replaced with concrete pavers. High-end cherry veneers make our kitchen. The soaking tub is set in fresh plaster. "Full-spectrum" paint relies on other pigments to create rich colors.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A retractable awning and a scotia moldings get installed. Soapstone counters get sealed with wax. Floor warming goes in and Richard tells us why the ERV unit is the house's most important equipment.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Light green grout is used with glass tiles in the backsplash. Our garage gets a new insulated steel door and a storage. A gas stove goes in. Layers of light create distinct spaces.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm and Kevin congratulate Andy on a job well done. Richard shares an advanced programmable thermostat with solar shades installed on the first floor. The final decor choices are shown.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: This season, TOH turns a dark, divided 1887 two-family into an open, Scandinavian-style one-family.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin visits an "eco" resale store in Springfield. Arborist Jack Kelly removes a sick maple. The architects show Kevin the plan, then visit a house down the street for design ideas.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm shows the antique features of the building. Tom relocates a load-bearing wall. Kevin learns about appropriate colors for the house. Tom frames in the basement. The electrical service is upgraded.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom works on the ceiling and fits a skylight. Kevin learns about our house's style in Fairfield. Norm shows the framing progress on the second floor. Richard arrives with ductwork.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin joins Cambridge locals biking to work. An architect presents a plan for the yard. Tom removes steps to the roof deck. Roger tackles the stump from the maple. Plumbers use a pipe to dull sound.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A mason repoints the foundation. Norm and Tom repair the front porch. Kevin visits Community Rowing. Spray foam insulation begins in our balloon frame house.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger replaces the front walk. Tom shows Kevin the replacement windows. A tile contractor uses a shower waterproofing system. Kevin sees a modern home in Brookline. A painting contractor starts prep.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A taste of the local Japan Town. Norm and Tom match the old shingle pattern. Kevin visits interior designers for a peek at the Scandinavian Modern vision. Radiant heat and the boiler are going in.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet's dinner date with an important, but lecherous, man from the home office turns into a disaster when her "chaperone," Jack, gets drunk and falls asleep in her bed.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Terri breaks up with her ill-tempered boyfriend, he believes that Jack is the cause. Guest Star(s): Jeffrey Tambor

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry arranges a blind date for Jack - with a jewel thief who mistakes him for a fence.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet's date, a newspaper writer, offers to do a column on the trio's methods of coping with inflation. The published article, however, insinuates that their living arrangement is more intimate than practical.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is conned into renting a small restaurant - only to discover that it's a run-down disaster. Guest Star(s): Jordan Charney

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry, who put the wrong date on the flyers announcing the opening of "Jack's Bistro," manages to "save" the day by inviting his Greek relatives.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's attempted romance with Felipe's beautiful cousin, Maria, is plagued by problems - Janet, Terri, Maria's inability to speak English, and Maria's fiancé.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is happy that her old friend, Randy, is dating Jack - until she discovers that Randy is married.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack hosts a Sunday brunch to convince the Reverend Gilmore that the Bistro is a respectable establishment. He succeeds until the newlywed couple at the next table begin their honeymoon. Guest Star(s): Earl Boen

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is grateful for Larry's suggestion of a free guitarist as a business boost - until he finds out that he has a vocalist - Larry.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Furley discovers that the nice young man that Janet and Jack have fixed Terri up with is a convicted murderer.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry completely trusts Jack to show his teenage sister around town - until he discovers that they are still out at 2 a.m.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: By the time an innocent story is retold through several people, the trio believes Bob and Carol's marriage is on the rocks. Larry and Terri try to straighten things out with the couple - only to be "caught" by Mr. Furley.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When the Bistro's building inspector demands a bribe from Jack, Janet suggests that they tape the next conversation for evidence. The recording the police hear, however, is of Furley telling Jack he has the pot (terrain) he wanted.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is making plans for her wedding to a soap opera star - until Jack discovers that his sleazy reputation is well-earned.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack challenges a guy who has insulted Furley to a boxing match. His opponent, the girls learn, is a Golden Glove contender with 22 knockouts.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Furley helps Jack lose his "I can stay away for a week" bet with the girls.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Terri believe that Janet is trying to seduce Furley's shy nephew.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Instead of catching sleep in the dingy apartment above his restaurant, Jack catches Mr. Angelino with a young woman.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri falls for Jack when he buys a mustache which makes him look like her old boyfriend.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A former cook in the Navy with Jack comes to town to con his way into a partnership in Jack's Bistro.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls fake a contest to give Jack the rent money he needs for Jack's Bistro. Their good deed turns to disaster when Jack spends the money on a leather coat.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Cheryl asks Jack to father her child, but Jack refuses. Janet thinks Cheryl wants to marry Jack because she's going to have his baby, so she talks Jack into complying with Cheryl's wishes. Guest Star(s): Joanna Kerns

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry discovers an answered magazine quiz and he and Jack think one of the girls wants to have an affair with Jack. They take the girls on a weekend trip to find out who answered the quiz so Jack can talk her out of it.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack receives $1,000 by mistake from an automated cash machine. He hides it in the couch for the weekend but when the Bank Security arrives to collect the money, it is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack writes a nasty letter to a famous food critic, thinking the critic is going to give his bistro a ruinous review. When the critic assures Jack the review will be favorable, Jack tries to retrieve the letter from the critic's desk.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is dating a sex therapist who has asked him to keep her job a secret. Janet, concluding she is a prostitute, is nasty to her and no one can understand why - especially when Janet's own father has become so friendly with her.

programme.title: Tiny House Hunting

programme.title: Tiny House Hunting
